category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a package manager in the style of Arch pacman; official README describes pacapt as a pacman-like shell wrapper for many package managers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pacapt; official README heading uses pacapt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage, supported operations, and links to the official help text.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/icy/pacapt, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify pacapt as a pacman-like wrapper for many package managers; source_facts.executables lists pacapt CLI.
